creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 158025
Update to 3.4.5

Update to PowerDNS 3.4.5

This release fixes a performance issue with malformed qnames, makes
PowerDNS buildable on OpenBSD (thanks Ruben Kerkhof and Florian Obser!)
and adds a slew of PKCS#11 improvements (thanks to Aki Tuomi).

Full changelog: https://rtfm.powerdns.com/md/changelog/#powerdns-authoritative-server-345
